dh rkjh[k ls ,d ekl [Qk- la- Hkkjkjkizk@13013@635@11&12@lhvks@thlh&dks;Ecrwj ¼102-035&144-68 vkSj 170-88&183-01½ chvksVh] vyds'k 'kekZ] la;qDr lfpo lanHkZ % vf/klwpuk la[;k dk-vk- 467 ¼v½ rkjh[k 26 Qjojh] 2013 MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 20th September, 2013 S.O. 2825(E).—In exercise of the power conferred by section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), the Central Government hereby makes following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Road Transport and Highways number S.O. 467 (E), dated the 26th February, 2013, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), namely:— In the English version of the said notification for paragraph 2 and paragraph 1, 2 & 4 of Notes, the following paragraphs shall be substituted namely:- For paragraph – 2 following is substituted ; And whereas, pursuant to the provision of section 14 of the National Highways Authority of India Act, 1988 (68 of 1988), the Authority has entered into an Agreement (hereinafter referred to as said agreement) with M/s. IVRCL Chengapalli Tollways Limited, having its registered office at M22/3RT, Vijayanagar Colony, Hyderabad – 500057, Andhra Pradesh, India, (hereinafter referred to as the “Concessionaire”), the successful bidder for bids submitted on 26.11.2009 for the development of Chengapalli to Start of Coimbatore Bypass from Km. 100.000 at Chengapalli (Design Chainage Km. 102.035) to Km 141.660 at Coimbatore Bypass start (Design Chainage Km. 144.680) and from Km. 167.830 (Design Chainage 170.880) at Coimbatore Bypass end, to Km. 182.250 (Design Chainage 183.010) at Walayar End of Coimbatore Bypass on National Highway No. 47 (hereinafter referred to as the “said section”) to six lane and four lane divided carriageway respectively and operation and maintenance of the said sections. -- 2 of 3 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(ii)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 For Note – 1 following is substituted ; 1. The fee levied and collected hereunder shall be due and payable at the following Toll Plaza for distance specified for such Toll Plaza: Location of Toll Plaza (chainage) Length (in km.) for which Fee is payable Km./Ch. 136.840 (Existing Chainage Km. 134.100) near Kaniyur village in Coimbatore district 30.160 For Note – 2 following is substituted ; 2. In addition to above, the following fee shall also be due and payable for the use of the following bridge(s)/structure(s)/Bypass(s), cost of which is specified hereunder, at the following Toll Plaza(s): Location of Toll Plaza (chainage) Bypass Length (in km.) and Cost of Bypass (in Rupees crore) for which additional fee is payable Km./Ch. 136.840 (Existing Chainage Km. 134.100) near Kaniyur village in Coimbatore district Length Cost Perumanallur Bypass – 4.70 Km. length Rs. 50.41 Crore Avinashi Bypass – 7.85 Km. length Rs. 102.66 Crore For Note – 4 following is substituted; 4. For multiple journeys on the highway section, passes shall be issued at the following rates, namely. Amount Payable Maximum number of one way journeys allowed Period of validity One and half times of the fee for one way journey Two Twenty four hours from the time of payment Two-third of amount of the fee payable for fifty or more single journeys Fifty or more One month from date of payment [F. No NHAI/13013/635/11-12/CO/GC-Coimbatore (102.035-144.68 & 170.88-183.01) BOT] ALKESH SHARMA, Jt. Secy. Reference : Notification No S.O. 467 (E) dated 26th February, 2013. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 3 of 3 --
